title: Comforting Creamy Malaysian Chicken Curry
description: A cultured and light Malaysian dish featuring pancetta and soffritto-base, perfect for a comforting meal. This recipe is gluten-free friendly.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat and cook the pancetta until crispy.
Remove the pancetta from the pan and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pan and cook until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken to the pan and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the curry powder to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the coconut milk and chicken broth to the pan and bring to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 20 minutes.
Stir in the cooked pancetta and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the curry hot over rice or noodles.
